title: On Holding Stock Stumbles Despite Earnings Beat and Raised 2023 Guidance
text: On Holding reported strong Q3 2023 earnings but stock stumbled despite beating expectations and raising full-year guidance. The company beat EPS estimates at $0.22 versus consensus of $0.16, and reported strong revenue growth of 47% year-over-year with record net sales over CHF 480 million. Despite the strong results and raised guidance to CHF 1.79 billion for full-year 2023, investor sentiment turned cautious. This reflected concerns about growth sustainability and potential market saturation. The disconnect between strong earnings results and stock performance highlighted the importance of managing investor expectations and addressing macro headwinds beyond the company's control.
